name: Calibration Beacon: "Invincible Northwind"
description: A calibration marker created in the likeness of Mondstadt's famous Knight of Boreas. In contrast to the knight's usual dignified image, the design here is distinctly playful and charming.\n"I ought to design a few more. Every well-known knight should have one..." Since their release, these distinctive markers have been well received. They bring a welcome touch of fun to the work of surveying while also showcasing some of the Knights of Favonius' most notable figures...
